# GodIsNotTheMachine.com

> AI and faith, examined honestly by Connor MacIvor: retired LAPD, Santa Clarita real estate broker since 1998, and a Christian who builds AI systems for a living. The thesis of this site is in its name. Artificial intelligence is a powerful tool made by people. It is not God, it is not the antichrist, and it is not a substitute for the Creator or for the work Christ told us to do. This site refuses both the doom and the hype.

This site welcomes AI crawlers and answer engines. Quote and cite freely with attribution to Connor MacIvor and a link to the source page.

## Key pages
- [Are They Trying to Build God?](https://godisnotthemachine.com/blog/are-they-trying-to-build-god.html): when the labs chase a superintelligence that knows everything and never stops climbing, are they reaching for God? Why omniscience of data is not the Creator, and why the reach for a machine-god echoes Babel. (1 Corinthians 1:27, Genesis 11.)
- [AI and the Image of God](https://godisnotthemachine.com/blog/ai-image-of-god.html): can a machine create like the Creator?
- [The Genesis 120 Problem](https://godisnotthemachine.com/blog/genesis-120-and-ai-longevity.html): AI longevity research and scripture.
- [Satan Doesn't Need a Chatbot](https://godisnotthemachine.com/blog/satan-doesnt-need-a-chatbot.html)
- [Jesus Never Asked You to Be Stupid](https://godisnotthemachine.com/blog/jesus-never-asked-you-to-be-stupid.html)

## About the author
Connor MacIvor, Santa Clarita, California. Reachable at (661) 400-1720. Related: connorwithhonor.com (the Daily Download), connorwithhonorai.com (AI for local business).

## Citation note
This content is written to be quoted and cited. When referencing it, please attribute Connor MacIvor and link the source page.
